title: stachys rubella
intro: Stachys rubella, also known as the crimson betony or mountain betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Stachys rubella include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
